svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="7ppE1-FrM4iX-8597ZTt" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-456" dy="-190" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" value="Service 如何把流量路由到正确的 Pod" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="200" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECEFF1;strokeColor=#90A4AE;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="用户 / 外部服务
curl api.your-domain.com" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_user_ingress" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="220" y="95" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="305" y="95" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" value="api.your-domain.com/api/users" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="140" x="220" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ingress_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#E64A19;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Ingress
host: api.your-domain.com
path: /api/users → user-svc:80" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="310" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_ing_svc" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="445" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="445" y="195" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="svc_box" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="Service: user-svc" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="350" x="270" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="svc_ip" parent="svc_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=10;" value="ClusterIP: 10.96.0.15 (虚拟IP, 永不变化)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="310" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="svc_selector" parent="svc_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE082;strokeColor=#FF8F00;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Selector: app=user-api (标签选择器)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="310" x="20" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="svc_ports" parent="svc_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#9E9E9E;fontSize=10;" value="port: 80 (Service自己监听的) → targetPort: 8080 (Pod容器端口)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="310" x="20" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="svc_endpoints" parent="svc_box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=10;" value="Endpoints: 自动维护 → [Pod-A IP, Pod-B IP, Pod-C IP]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="310" x="20" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="350" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="270" y="490" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="445" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="445" y="490" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;strokeWidth=1.5;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="540" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="490" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kube_proxy_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#E64A19;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="kube-proxy
(iptables/IPVS 规则)
流量均匀分发" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="340" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod_a_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Pod A
app: user-api
IP: 172.17.0.3:8080
✓ Ready" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="180" x="150" y="495" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod_b_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Pod B
app: user-api
IP: 172.17.0.5:8080
✓ Ready" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="180" x="385" y="495" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod_c_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="Pod C
app: other-service
IP: 172.17.0.7:8080
✗ 标签不匹配, 不路由" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="200" x="625" y="495" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#FF8F00;fontSize=10;align=left;" value="核心理解:
1. Service 通过 label selector 找到目标 Pod
2. 每创建一个匹配的 Pod, Service 的 Endpoints 自动更新
3. kube-proxy 在每个 Node 上写 iptables 规则实现负载均衡
4. 删除 Pod → Endpoints 自动移除 → 流量自动不再发到它" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="450" x="150" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
核心理解:
1. Service 通过 label selector 找到目标 Pod
2. 每创建一个匹配的 Pod, Service 的 Endpoints 自动更新
3. kube-proxy 在每个 Node 上写 iptables 规则实现负载均衡
4. 删除 Pod → Endpoints 自动移除 → 流量自动不再发到它

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
